title: Portable Agent Protocol Memory Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating episodic history entries, semantic records, and handoff packets.

id.description: Unique identifier (UUID v4) for the interaction turn.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 formatted timestamp of the turn.

role.description: Role of the participant in this turn.

content.description: Text payload of the turn or serialized tool result.

tool.description: Name of the tool executed in this turn, if applicable.

key.description: A unique identifier for the long-term knowledge concept.

value.description: The payload of the stored concept (can be primitive or complex).

task_state.description: Brief description of the current task state.

pending_steps.description: Array of remaining task checklist items.

context_summary.description: High-level summary of context, goals, and history for the next agent.

memory_snapshot.description: A dictionary snapshot of important key-value pairs from short/long-term memory.
